candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Interest-Bearing Liabilities - Balancing value
candidates.why: Appears to be the non-lease remainder of current interest-bearing liabilities after separating out the explicit lease line; suitable for STD under the rule excluding leases.
Financing-related current borrowing component listed within current liabilities; include if it is reported separately from the non-lease balancing remainder.
Potential additional current financing liability, but relation to the current-portion total is ambiguous.
Would ordinarily be the best total, but it clearly includes lease liabilities because the explicit 'S/T Finance Leases' plus other components sum to it; baseline STD excludes leases.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Interest-Bearing Liabilities - Balancing value

variables.notes: R:c. Selected non-lease current debt components and excluded 'S/T Finance Leases' per rule. Manual review needed because 'Other Interest-Bearing Liabilities' may also represent current debt in some years, but including it risks double counting against the current-portion breakdown.
